# Multicast Fastdrops Dashboards using AQL

# What do these Dashboards do ?

The AQL based Multicast fastdrops dashboards aim to show all fastdrops entries happening across all switches, across the network. For more information on what multicast fastdrops is please refer [here](https://arista.my.site.com/AristaCommunity/s/article/multicast-fastdrops) and [here](https://www.arista.com/en/um-eos/eos-multicast-architecture#xx1151589). 

# Install and Setup

1. Download multicastFastdrops.json  
2. The telemetry path that this dashboard depends on is not streamed by default to CV. So this needs to be manually configured.  
3. Ingesting the telemetry path:  
   1. Using the Service Explorer UI:  
1. Access Service Explorer by going to [https://x.x.x.x/cv/settings/service-explorer](https://x.x.x.x/cv/settings/service-explorer) , where x.x.x.x is the CVP IP/FQDN or the CVaaS regional URL  
2. Fill out the request:

   Service Name: tastreaming.TerminattrStreaming

   Method Name: SubscribeTAPaths

3. Copy and paste as shown below:

   {

    "filter": {

      "app\_name": "fastdrops",

      "include\_paths": \[

        "/Sysdb/routing/hardware/multicast"

      \],

      "exclude\_paths": \[\]

    }

   }

   

   

4. Click on `Send Request` and check on the right hand side that the result is `root: {} 0 keys`.

![][image1]

4. Install multicastFastdrops.json on CV  
   1. Go to cvp/dashboard page and click on Import , upload  and import the json file  
   2. The dashboards should show up now on Dashboards page

![][image2]

3. ![][image3]
